test_description: Verify successful application of Terraform-managed database schema and pgvector extension.
business_risk: Data persistence failure, AI matching unavailability
preconditions: PostgreSQL instance provisioned; Terraform CLI configured.
test_steps: 1. Execute 'terraform apply' for the RDS module. 2. Connect to the database using psql or a client. 3. Query 'SELECT * FROM pg_extension;' 4. Verify tables 'projects', 'vendors', 'sow_documents' exist with correct constraints.
expected_result: Terraform applies without error. pgvector extension is listed in extensions. All core tables exist with defined primary and foreign keys.
failure_impact: System cannot store data or perform vector search

test_description: Verify vector index performance with HNSW index on vendor skills.
preconditions: Database populated with 10,000 vendor profiles with vector embeddings.
test_steps: 1. Execute a vector similarity search query using '<=>' operator. 2. Measure query execution time. 3. Verify execution plan uses the HNSW index and not a sequential scan.
expected_result: Query returns top 10 matches in < 100ms. EXPLAIN ANALYZE shows index scan.

test_description: Verify validation logic rejects unsupported file types.
preconditions: NestJS UploadController initialized.
test_steps: 1. Send POST request to /api/v1/projects/{id}/sow. 2. Attach a file with .exe extension (application/x-msdownload). 3. Submit request.
expected_result: API returns 400 Bad Request. Error message indicates invalid file type. File is not uploaded to S3.

test_description: Verify successful multipart upload of large PDF to S3 and database update.
preconditions: S3 bucket exists. Project record exists in DB.
test_steps: 1. Send POST request with 15MB PDF file. 2. Verify API returns 201 Created. 3. Verify file exists in S3 bucket. 4. Verify SOW record in DB has status 'PROCESSING'. 5. Verify 'SowUploaded' event published to SNS.
expected_result: File stored in S3. DB updated. SNS event published.
cleanup_requirements: Delete object from S3, clean DB
performance_expectations: Upload time dependent on bandwidth, processing < 500ms

test_description: Verify idempotency logic prevents double processing.
preconditions: DB mocked with SOW record in 'PROCESSED' state.
test_steps: 1. Invoke worker handler with 'SowUploaded' event for the already processed SOW ID. 2. Observe worker behavior.
expected_result: Worker logs 'Already processed', acknowledges message, and exits without triggering PII/AI pipelines.

test_description: Verify full processing pipeline: Download -> Redact -> Extract -> Save.
preconditions: S3 has file. Mocked Comprehend/OpenAI services.
test_steps: 1. Publish message to SQS. 2. Worker consumes message. 3. Worker downloads file. 4. Worker calls PII service (mock). 5. Worker calls Data Extraction (mock). 6. Worker updates DB with extracted JSON.
expected_result: DB record updated to 'PROCESSED'. Extracted data saved in JSONB column. Original message ACKed.
test_data_needs: Sample SOW file in S3, Mock AI responses

test_description: Verify detection and replacement of standard PII entities.
preconditions: AWS Comprehend mock configured.
test_steps: 1. Call redact function with text: 'Contact John Doe at john@example.com or 555-0199'. 2. Mock Comprehend returning PERSON, EMAIL, PHONE entities.
expected_result: Returned text is: 'Contact [PERSON] at [EMAIL] or [PHONE]'.

test_description: Verify structure of JSON response from LLM integration.
preconditions: OpenAI API Key available or VCR cassette recorded.
test_steps: 1. Send sanitized text to extraction service. 2. Service constructs prompt enforcing JSON schema. 3. Call OpenAI API. 4. Validate response against Zod schema.
expected_result: Response matches expected JSON structure (skills, timeline, deliverables). No hallucinated fields.

test_description: Verify rejection of webhooks with invalid signatures.
preconditions: Webhook endpoint exposed.
test_steps: 1. Generate a payload simulating 'payment_intent.succeeded'. 2. Sign payload with an incorrect secret key. 3. POST to /api/webhooks/stripe.
expected_result: Server returns 400 Bad Request / 401 Unauthorized. Event is not processed. Security warning logged.

test_description: Verify successful payment webhook updates project status.
preconditions: Project in 'Awarded' state. Invoice exists.
test_steps: 1. Generate valid 'payment_intent.succeeded' event payload for the project's invoice. 2. Sign with correct test secret. 3. POST to webhook endpoint.
expected_result: Response 200 OK. Project status updates to 'Active'. Transaction record created/updated to 'Completed'. Audit log entry created.

test_description: Verify invoice calculation logic handles margins and tax correctly.
preconditions: Project proposal amount = $10,000. Margin = 10%. Tax = 0%.
test_steps: 1. Call invoice calculation service with inputs. 2. Verify total amount = $11,000. 3. Verify vendor payout amount = $10,000. 4. Verify platform revenue = $1,000.
expected_result: Calculations are accurate to 2 decimal places.

test_description: Verify RBAC prevents unauthorized access to Admin Dashboard.
preconditions: User created with 'Vendor Contact' role.
test_steps: 1. Log in as Vendor Contact. 2. Obtain valid JWT. 3. Attempt to GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard using the token.
expected_result: API returns 403 Forbidden. Access is denied.

test_description: Verify invalid state transitions are rejected.
preconditions: State machine definition loaded.
test_steps: 1. Attempt to transition project from 'Pending' directly to 'Completed'. 2. Attempt to transition from 'Active' to 'Proposed'.
expected_result: Service throws 'InvalidStateTransitionException' for both cases.

test_description: Verify email dispatch via SES mock.
preconditions: SES Mock (LocalStack) running.
test_steps: 1. Trigger 'sendEmail' method in Notification Service. 2. Verify call reaches SES Mock with correct To, Subject, and Body.
expected_result: Email queued in SES Mock.

test_description: Verify recommendation logic filters non-active vendors.
preconditions: DB has 1 Active vendor (perfect match) and 1 Deactivated vendor (perfect match).
test_steps: 1. Call matching service for a project. 2. Check returned list.
expected_result: Only the Active vendor is returned. Deactivated vendor is excluded regardless of similarity score.

test_description: Verify dashboard metrics load correctly.
preconditions: Admin logged in. Data exists for active projects and revenue.
test_steps: 1. Navigate to /admin/dashboard. 2. Wait for loading to complete. 3. Verify 'Active Projects' count matches DB. 4. Verify 'Total Revenue' matches DB.
expected_result: Dashboard renders with correct aggregated numbers. No 0s or NaNs (unless db is empty).

test_description: Verify human-in-the-loop editing and saving of SOW data.
preconditions: Admin logged in. Project with processed SOW exists.
test_steps: 1. Navigate to SOW Review page. 2. Verify extracted data is pre-filled. 3. Edit 'Required Skills' tag input. 4. Click 'Save Changes'. 5. Reload page.
expected_result: Save is successful (toast notification). Reloaded page shows updated skills tags.

test_description: Verify payment link expires and cannot be reused.
preconditions: Invoice paid. Payment link token exists.
test_steps: 1. Attempt to access payment page with a token for an already 'PAID' invoice. 2. Verify response.
expected_result: User redirected to error page stating 'Link Expired or Already Paid'. Payment form does not load.

test_description: Verify critical actions generate audit logs.
preconditions: Audit service running.
test_steps: 1. Perform a critical action (e.g., Change User Role via API). 2. Query Audit Log table for recent entries.
expected_result: New record found with correct Actor ID, Action Type, Timestamp, and Old/New values.

test_description: Verify vendor can submit a proposal with a file upload.
preconditions: Vendor logged in. Project in 'Proposed' state.
test_steps: 1. Navigate to Project Details. 2. Fill proposal form (Cost, Timeline). 3. Upload PDF proposal document. 4. Submit.
expected_result: Form submits successfully. Success message shown. Backend records proposal and stores file.
